_notes: WebShop HGPO-LLMJudge on the AlfWorld SOTA recipe (rank-32 + MLP target modules, K=8, kl=0.04, lr=5e-6, T=1.0 launcher) PLUS the new WebShop-specific dense signal (env.use_attribute_progress_intermediate_reward=true). Judge config (backend=openai, gpt-4o-mini, cache=/vol/cache/judge.sqlite, max_judge_calls_per_run=5000) clones configs/LLMJudge.json verbatim — the dedup cache makes subsequent runs mostly cache-hit so the 5000-call budget should easily cover a 10-round 80-eps run. The dense signal is the main beneficiary for the LLM judge path: the judge sees richer per-turn raw_env_reward context (intermediate_reward fills in non-terminal turns), so its preference scoring chain has more signal to attach to. seed=31 (NOT 11 or 23) — disjoint training task slice from the other two methods. Launcher: scripts/run_webshop_SOTA_LLMJudge_v1.sh.
